en.extract:
The western shriketit (Falcunculus leucogaster) is a species of bird in the family Falcunculidae.
It is sparsely distributed across Southwest Australia.

The '''western shriketit''' ('''''Falcunculus leucogaster''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Falcunculidae]].
It is sparsely distributed across [[Southwest Australia]].
